svg.title: Tattoo portfolio platform — full-stack architecture
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture: Next.js frontend, Django REST API backend, MySQL database, with Docker wrapping everything.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What pages does the Next.js frontend include?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the public pages')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the admin pages')
sendPrompt('Show me the public API endpoints')
sendPrompt('Show me the protected admin API endpoints')
sendPrompt('Show me the Portfolio Django model')
sendPrompt('Show me the Contact Django model')
